overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk along a futuristic coastal promenade, transitioning onto a sandy beach and through a concrete underpass beneath highway infrastructure. The scene features a bright sunny atmosphere with palm trees, scattered debris, and a distant roller coaster structure over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete waterfront promenade with palm trees and debris

events.description: passing by deceased bodies and scattered debris on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete promenade toward the large building complex ahead

entered.detail: large concrete planters with tall palm trees lining the walkway
silver metal safety railing along the right edge of the path
massive multi-level concrete and glass structure with neon signage
elevated highway infrastructure with support columns
scattered trash and deceased individuals lying on the concrete

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit concrete promenade lined with palm trees in planters. The camera moves forward past metal railings and benches, approaching a large futuristic building complex. Debris and bodies are scattered across the walkway, indicating recent violence in this otherwise empty urban waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach transition with coastal amusement park view

events.description: turning right from concrete promenade onto sandy beach area
descending from concrete steps onto the beach sand

agents.ego_description: turning toward the beach and walking down onto the sand, approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: golden sandy beach stretching toward the water
calm coastal water with gentle waves
large steel roller coaster structure extending over the water
small elevated wooden structure on the beach
tall futuristic towers with holographic billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right from the promenade onto a sandy beach, revealing a panoramic view of the coastline. A massive roller coaster structure extends over the water in the distance, while futuristic skyscrapers rise behind the beach. The camera descends onto the sand, passing a wooden lifeguard stand.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass beneath coastal highway with parked vehicles

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the concrete overpass structure
passing futuristic parked cars and motorcycles under the structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark concrete underpass with massive support pillars on both sides

entered.detail: massive square concrete support pillars with graffiti markings
futuristic vehicles with glowing accents parked in rows
parked bikes near the concrete columns
underside of the highway deck above creating deep shadows

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark concrete underpass beneath the highway, where sunlight is blocked by the overhead structure. The space is filled with massive support pillars covered in graffiti, and several futuristic cars and motorcycles are parked in the shadows. The ground remains sandy as the path continues beneath the infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline with amusement park pier

events.description: exiting the underpass back into bright sunlight on the beach
slowing pace to observe the shoreline and distant roller coaster structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge on the sandy beach, observing the distant amusement park and city skyline

entered.detail: calm water lapping at the sandy shore with gentle waves
large structure at the base of the roller coaster with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark underpass into bright sunlight, the camera returns to the open beach. The view opens up to show the shoreline extending into the distance, with the roller coaster structure now centered in the frame. The camera walks along the water's edge, with the city skyline visible to the left and the calm ocean to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate urban promenade through a dark industrial underpass and back onto a wide, sunlit beach. It begins by moving forward along a concrete walkway lined with palm trees and scattered debris, passing metal railings toward a futuristic building complex. As the camera turns right, the urban environment gives way to a sandy coastline featuring a wooden lifeguard stand and a massive roller coaster structure extending over the distant water. The scene then shifts abruptly into the shadows of a concrete underpass, where the bright light is replaced by graffiti-covered pillars and parked futuristic vehicles beneath a highway. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness back into the brilliant sunlight, walking along the water's edge with the city skyline to the left and the open ocean to the right.
